---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: 'feature'
assignees: ''

---

### Note 注意事项

By opening this issue, I have searched the existing issues and
believe that this is not a duplicate.
在打开此问题之前，我已经搜索了现有的反馈，并且认为这不是一个重复的反馈

### Describe the feature(s) 描述想要的功能

A clear and concise description of what the feature\(s\) you wanted.
一个清晰简洁的描述你想要的功能是什么
